Hi Dmitry,

I've attached an updated patch that addresses suggestions by portclippy[1], there were a few nit-picks as-well-as a general cleanup of the option helpers. If you're happy, I'll include these changes in the commit. 

[1] Please do feel free to check out portfmt tools if you haven't already (https://www.freshports.org/ports-mgmt/portfmt). :-)

Thanks!
